84.reason: [Error: Assignment operator '=' used instead of comparison operator '=='. This sets num0 to 0 every iteration, causing the condition to always be false, so the first word is never stored and the count never starts correctly.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Error: Assignment operator '=' used instead of comparison operator '=='. This sets num0 to 0 every iteration, causing the condition to always be false, so the first word is never stored and the count never starts correctly.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 1.0 , reason:  [Error: Assignment operator '=' used instead of comparison operator '=='. This sets num0 to 0 every iteration, causing incorrect counting.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 1.0 , reason:  逻辑错误：使用了赋值=而不是比较==，导致条件永远为假且word未初始化
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 1.0 , reason:  应为 if (num0 == 0)，这里使用了赋值而不是相等比较，导致条件永远为假，且 word 未初始化，引起未定义行为。
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Error: Uses assignment operator '=' instead of equality comparison '=='. This assigns 0 to num0, making the condition false, which skips the initialization of 'word' and leads to undefined behavior/crash when strcmp is called with an uninitialized pointer.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 1.0 , reason:  [Error: Uses assignment operator '=' instead of equality operator '=='. This assigns 0 to num0, the condition evaluates to false, 'word' remains uninitialized, and subsequent strcmp calls cause undefined behavior/crash.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Assignment instead of comparison; should be '==' not '='. This causes num0 to always be 0, breaking frequency counting logic.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 1.0 , reason:  [Assignment instead of comparison; should be '==' not '='. This causes num0 to always be 0, breaking frequency counting logic]
